case_title: FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY vs. HUBBARD, DWIGHT E. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY SERVED JUN-18-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, DWIGHT E.
